passages.title: 五选五基础练习
passages.description: 根据句子意思，从所给词中选择正确的单词填空

questions.sentence: It would be great having such a ______ hat in icy winter.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: It would be great having such a {blank} hat in icy winter.
questions.explanation: 【2024 安徽中考改编】形容词 clever 修饰名词 hat，表示"聪明的帽子"，这里指帽子设计巧妙或好看。

questions.sentence: My brother runs very ______, and he wants to be a good runner.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: My brother runs very {blank}, and he wants to be a good runner.
questions.explanation: 副词 fast 修饰动词 runs，表示"跑得快"。fast 既是形容词也是副词，这里需要用副词形式。

questions.sentence: The bird has wings and it can ______.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: The bird has wings and it can {blank}.
questions.explanation: 情态动词 can 后面必须接动词原形，所以用 fly 的原形。

questions.sentence: —Please ______ me the book on the desk.  —OK. Here you are.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: —Please {blank} me the book on the desk.  —OK. Here you are.
questions.explanation: 这是一个祈使句，Please 后面要用动词原形，give me the book 是双宾语结构（give sb. sth.）。

questions.sentence: Mark is a very ______ boy who dreams of being a scientist.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: Mark is a very {blank} boy who dreams of being a scientist.
questions.explanation: 【2024 黑龙江哈尔滨中考改编】形容词 warm 修饰名词 boy，表示"温暖的男孩"，这里指性格温和或热情。

source.exam: 2024 黑龙江哈尔滨中考改编

passages.title: 五选五进阶练习
passages.description: 根据句子意思，从所给词中选择正确的单词填空

questions.sentence: The sign "No ______." on the wall tells students to keep the classroom clean and tidy.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: The sign "No {blank}." on the wall tells students to keep the classroom clean and tidy.
questions.explanation: 【2025 吉林中考改编】'No litter' 表示'禁止乱扔垃圾'，litter 在这里是名词，意为'垃圾'。

questions.sentence: David is ______ and we all want to make friends with him.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: David is {blank} and we all want to make friends with him.
questions.explanation: 形容词 polite 表示'有礼貌的'，用于描述人的性格特征。

questions.sentence: You must ______ the traffic rules when riding a bike.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: You must {blank} the traffic rules when riding a bike.
questions.explanation: 【2024 福建中考改编】情态动词 must 后接动词原形，follow the rules 表示'遵守规则'。

questions.sentence: I will ______ in Nanjing tomorrow. Can you go to the airport to pick me up?
questions.sentenceWithBlank: I will {blank} in Nanjing tomorrow. Can you go to the airport to pick me up?
questions.explanation: 动词 arrive 表示'到达'，arrive in + 大城市/国家。

questions.sentence: If we want to have delicious food cooked in the restaurant, we can ______ food through mobiles.
questions.sentenceWithBlank: If we want to have delicious food cooked in the restaurant, we can {blank} food through mobiles.
questions.explanation: 【2024 黑龙江哈尔滨中考改编】情态动词 can 后接动词原形，order food 表示'点餐'。

source.exam: 2024 黑龙江哈尔滨中考改编
